comment.body:
A lot of question about the trading signals. 
I wrote, that I share my trades only when I see that the setup is interesting enough, or when I want to help you out of something, and when I have high conviction enough.
However, in the past few weeks I mostly did vol trades and swing trades...
there was no point to share them, bcs you could not copy that... wouldn't be helpful.

reading my posts, I give you clear clues about the trading setups, even directional ones, if needed.
And the ones who remember to April, knows that even if I say "long SPX here", there would be ppl who would be still confused... so... 
Remember: https://stochvoltrader.substack.com/p/aprils-performance-review

comment.body: After reading Alma's post today, my expected scenario is that if the market starts like now between 6009-6016 and stays there for the first 30 minutes, there is a high probability that it will go up to 6025, and if it goes above 30 from there, there is a possibility that it will go up to 50, and in the meantime, there is a high possibility that it will reverse and retrace to 6010. And if it goes below 6000 from there, it will quickly go up to the cetroid of 5979.88, which may be the bottom. If it goes below that at 5954.75, it may fall to 5917.

comment.body:
Which is the "almost". 

But apparently they are not able to defend properly against plane and drone attacks. Which weighs a lot mor than being able to bypass Tel Aviv defense once in a while. Bc Israel can basically attack "whatever they want". I read about rumors that they sent all their ships into sea because they would have been too easy targets in the harbours. 

All this is unconfirmed talk from military experts. I'm not one of the and cant assess any of it. Seeing the news how they wave the flag now, it seems to be credible somehow...
